pricing.billing_desc: You only pay when you earn money. All plans are free to start.
pricing.compare_desc:
With Billetto you pay 2% + 7 DKK per ticket. With Eventbrite up to 6.95% + 4.49 DKK per ticket.
With B-Social you only pay {{pct}} — and only on what you sell through us. No fixed fees, no per-ticket charges.
pricing.choose_plan_desc: All plans are free to start. Upgrade or downgrade anytime.
pricing.no_billing_desc: You only pay when you have revenue via B-Social. Create events and start selling!
pricing.pay_when_earn: You only pay when you earn money
pricing.pay_when_earn_desc: All plans are 100% free to start. B-Social only earns when you earn. No lock-in period, no hidden fees, no surprises. Start free and upgrade when your business grows.
pricing.ideal_for_vaekst: Growing businesses, padel centers, yoga studios
pricing.no_costs: No costs — neither fixed nor variable
pricing.bsocial_takes: B-Social takes {{pct}} of ticket revenue via the platform

s1.desc: Home of AaB — Aalborg's professional football stadium with a capacity of 14,000 spectators.

s2.desc: Northern Jutland's largest sports and event arena. Ice hockey, handball, concerts and fairs.

s3.desc: Centrally located swimming hall with a 50m pool, heated pool and wellness.

s4.desc: Popular park for running, football and outdoor training. Perfect for 5-a-side.

s5.desc: Fitness center, climbing wall and badminton courts in the iconic Nordkraft building.

k1.desc: Museum of modern and contemporary art. Designed by Alvar Aalto. Sculpture park and exhibitions.

k2.desc: Architecture and design center named after Jorn Utzon. Located at the waterfront.

k3.desc: Denmark's oldest provincial stage with theater, musical theater and modern performances.

k4.desc: Concert hall at the harbor with fantastic acoustics. Classical, jazz and world music.

k5.desc: Cultural center in a former power station. Cinema, theater, music and dining.

k6.desc: The city's history from the Middle Ages to the present. Free admission.

n1.desc: Viking burial site with over 700 graves. Amazing views over the Limfjord and Aalborg.

n2.desc: Beautiful walking and cycling path along the Limfjord. Perfect for a peaceful stroll with views.

n3.desc: Northern Jutland's wildlife park with over 1,500 animals. Popular with families and animal lovers.

n4.desc: Green oasis in the heart of Aalborg. Perfect for a break, picnic or a quiet walk.

n5.desc: Historic park with large trees, paths and benches. Quiet and peaceful.

n6.desc: Beach area with views over the Limfjord. Perfect for a sunset walk.

m1.desc: Aalborg's famous pedestrian street with restaurants, bars and cafes. Always buzzing with life.

m2.desc: Street food market in Nordkraft with kitchens from around the world. Budget-friendly.

m3.desc: Cozy cafe with great coffee, brunch and homemade cake. Perfect meeting spot.

m4.desc: Historic wine cellar from 1624. Wine, food and atmosphere in Aalborg's oldest cellar.

m5.desc: Charming street with small shops and cafes in historic half-timbered houses.

sp1.desc: Over 500 board games to choose from. Coffee, beer and snacks. Perfect for a cozy evening.

sp2.desc: Escape rooms with multiple themes. Team building and fun for friends and family.

e1.desc: Weekly social walk along the waterfront. Everyone is welcome — meet new people.

e2.desc: Relaxed walk in the park with coffee afterwards. Perfect for newcomers to the city.

e3.desc: Casual football in Kildeparken. All levels. We always need more players.

e4.desc: Settlers, Catan and pizza. All levels welcome.

mtb1.desc: Technical MTB trails in Hammer Bakker. 3 routes: green, blue, red. Fantastic terrain.

mtb2.desc: Long MTB trails through Rold Skov. Hilly terrain with technical sections.

mtb3.desc: Easy MTB route perfect for beginners. Flat forest trail with fun bumps.

vdr1.desc: Beautiful hiking trail along the Limfjord from Aalborg to Nibe.

vdr2.desc: Adventurous hiking trail through the gorge valley in Rold Skov. 5 km round trip.

vdr3.desc: Short hike with Viking history and panoramic views.

vdr4.desc: Beautiful hiking route with panoramic views over the Limfjord.

lob1.desc: 3-5 km running route in Kildeparken. Flat, lit in the evening.

lob2.desc: Flat route along the waterfront. Approx. 4 km round trip.

hnd1.desc: Fenced dog forest with plenty of space. Water station and benches.

hnd2.desc: Large fenced dog park. Separate areas for big and small dogs.

fsk1.desc: Good fishing spot by the Limfjord. Sea trout, flatfish and garfish in season.

fsk2.desc: Well-known fishing spot near Nibe. Good opportunities for sea trout from the coast.

bad1.desc: Aalborg's popular harbor bath at Vestre Bådehavn. Sauna and sun terrace. Free.

bad2.desc: Natural sandy beach on Egholm. Perfect summer day.

shl1.desc: Primitive shelter on Egholm with fire pit. Amazing starry sky.

shl2.desc: Forest shelter in the heart of Rold Skov. Fire pit, water and toilet nearby.

dyr1.desc: See wild red deer, wild boar and eagles. Best at sunrise.

dyr2.desc: Wild horses and cattle on Egholm. Up close and freely accessible.

cph1.desc: The world's second oldest amusement park. Concerts, food and adventure.

cph2.desc: Iconic waterfront promenade with colorful houses, restaurants and cafes.

cph3.desc: Trendy meatpacking district with galleries, restaurants and nightclubs.

aar1.desc: Iconic art museum with Rainbow Panorama on the rooftop.

aar2.desc: Open-air museum with historic buildings from all over Denmark.

ode1.desc: Museum dedicated to Hans Christian Andersen with interactive exhibitions.

nib1.desc: Cozy little fishing harbor with cafes and views over the Limfjord.

nib2.desc: Home of Nibe Festival — a popular summer music festival.

ska1.desc: Denmark's northernmost point. Where the Skagerrak and Kattegat meet.

rol1.desc: Beautiful national park in Rold Skov. Hiking trails and gorge valley.

mu1.desc: Aalborg's legendary music venue in Nordkraft. Live music.

mu2.desc: Live music, jam sessions and cultural events.

kr1.desc: Modern art museum with studios and workshops.

kr2.desc: Open studios. Ceramics, painting, photography and DIY workshops.

kr3.desc: Photo club with weekly photo walks and workshops.

fi1.desc: CrossFit box with a focus on community. WODs and open gym.

fi2.desc: Indoor climbing center with bouldering and top rope.

fi3.desc: Winter swimming with sauna. Cold plunge and warm community.

ou1.desc: Bird sanctuary with observation tower. Wetlands and wading birds.

ou2.desc: Guided tours in Northern Europe's largest raised bog. Red deer and eagles.

ou3.desc: Kayak club at the Limfjord. Borrow a kayak or SUP board.

ou4.desc: Riding school with horses for all levels.

so1.desc: Cozy cafe with board games and book club.

so2.desc: Cultural center with language cafe, film club and social events.

so3.desc: Meeting place for volunteers. Parent groups and networking.

ev1.desc: Stand-up comedy with local and national comedians.

ev2.desc: Weekly pub quiz with beer from their own brewery.

ev3.desc: Monthly flea market with vintage and second-hand goods.

te1.desc: Maker space with 3D printers and coding meetups.

te2.desc: Tech hub with gaming events and drone workshops.

errors.not_found_description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

legal.privacy_intro_description: At B-Social, we take your privacy seriously. This policy describes how we collect, use and protect your personal data.
legal.privacy_section1_responsible: B-Social is the data controller for the processing of your personal data.
legal.privacy_profile_google_oauth: Google OAuth data (if you use Google login)
legal.privacy_activity_events_interactions: Events you create, share or interact with
legal.privacy_location_city_radius: City and search radius (optionally provided by you)
legal.privacy_location_no_gps: We do NOT collect GPS data or precise location without your consent
legal.privacy_technical_gtm: Google Tag Manager data for anonymized analysis
legal.privacy_ai_chat_description: If you use the AI assistant, your message is sent to Cloudflare Workers AI (Llama 3). Messages are not permanently logged and are not used for AI model training.
legal.privacy_section3_intro: We process your data for the following purposes and legal bases:
legal.privacy_legal_basis_contract_b: Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR — performance of contract
legal.privacy_legal_basis_legitimate_f: Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR — legitimate interest
legal.privacy_legal_basis_obligation_c: Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR — legal obligation
legal.privacy_section4_intro: We share your data with the following third parties, who process data on our behalf:
legal.privacy_processor_supabase_desc: Hosted in the EU. Stores profiles, events and chat data.
legal.privacy_processor_cloudflare_desc: DDoS protection, edge computing and caching.
legal.privacy_processor_google_desc: Login via Google OAuth, anonymized analysis via GTM.
legal.privacy_processor_cf_ai_desc: Processes AI chat messages. No permanent storage.
legal.privacy_section4_no_third_party: We NEVER sell your data to third parties. Data is only shared as described above.
legal.privacy_section5_eu_hosting: Our primary data processing takes place in the EU (Supabase EU region).
legal.privacy_section5_us_transfers: Certain services (Google OAuth, Cloudflare) may process data in the USA under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework or equivalent safeguards.
legal.privacy_retention_profile: Profile data: As long as the account is active + 30 days after deletion
legal.privacy_retention_chat: Chat messages: As long as the account is active
legal.privacy_retention_push: Push tokens: Automatically expire after 60 days of inactivity
legal.privacy_retention_analytics: Analytics data: Anonymized, retained for up to 26 months
legal.privacy_section7_intro: As a data subject, you have the following rights. Contact us via
legal.privacy_right_access_desc: You can access the information we have registered about you.
legal.privacy_right_rectification_desc: You can request correction of inaccurate information.
legal.privacy_right_erasure_desc: You can request deletion of your data ("the right to be forgotten").
legal.privacy_right_portability_desc: You can receive your data in a structured format.
legal.privacy_right_objection_desc: You can object to certain types of data processing.
legal.privacy_right_restriction_desc: You can request that the processing of your data be temporarily restricted.
legal.privacy_section7_response_time: We will respond to your request within 30 days.
legal.privacy_cookies_necessary_desc: Session management and login via Supabase (httpOnly, secure).
legal.privacy_cookies_analytics_desc: Google Tag Manager for anonymized traffic analysis. Can be opted out of.
legal.privacy_cookies_pwa_desc: B-Social uses localStorage and IndexedDB to cache data locally for a faster experience. This data does not leave your device.
legal.privacy_section9_intro: We apply the following security measures:
legal.privacy_security_https: HTTPS with TLS 1.3 on all connections
legal.privacy_security_rls: Row-Level Security (RLS) in Supabase — users can only access their own data
legal.privacy_section9_breach_notice: In the event of a security breach, we will notify affected users and the Danish Data Protection Agency within 72 hours in accordance with GDPR Art. 33.
legal.privacy_section10_description: B-Social is not directed at children under 13 years of age. If we become aware that a child under 13 has created an account, we will delete the account. Contact us at
legal.privacy_section11_description: We may update this policy from time to time. Material changes will be announced via app notification or email. Continued use of B-Social after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
legal.privacy_section12_intro: If you believe we are processing your data in violation of GDPR, you can file a complaint with:
legal.privacy_section13_intro: If you have questions about this privacy policy or our data processing, you are welcome to contact us:
legal.privacy_footer_line1: B-Social — Your platform for social experiences
legal.terms_intro_description: These terms and conditions ("the Terms") govern your use of the B-Social platform. By using B-Social, you accept these terms.
legal.terms_section1_description: B-Social is a Danish social platform that connects people through shared interests, events and experiences. The platform is operated by B-Social, based in Aalborg, Denmark.
legal.terms_section2_intro: By creating an account on B-Social, you confirm that:
legal.terms_accept_age: You are at least 13 years old
legal.terms_accept_read: You have read and accepted these terms and our privacy policy
legal.terms_accept_correct_info: The information you provide is accurate
legal.terms_accept_compliance: You will comply with applicable laws when using the platform
legal.terms_section3_responsibility: You are responsible for keeping your login credentials confidential. Notify us immediately via
legal.terms_section3_unauthorized_suffix: if you discover unauthorized access to your account.
legal.terms_section3_google_oauth: If you use Google login, Google's terms of service also apply. We only receive your name and email from Google.
legal.terms_section4_allowed_intro: B-Social is intended for social purposes. You may:
legal.terms_allowed_create_events: Create and participate in events and activities
legal.terms_allowed_communicate: Communicate with other users via chat
legal.terms_not_allowed_commercial: Use the platform for illegal purposes or commercial spam
legal.terms_not_allowed_spam: Send unsolicited messages, advertisements or spam
legal.terms_not_allowed_illegal_content: Upload offensive, illegal or infringing content
legal.terms_not_allowed_data_collection: Automatically collect data from the platform (scraping)
legal.terms_section5_ownership: You own the content you create on B-Social (events, messages, profile data). By posting content, you grant B-Social a non-exclusive license to display it on the platform.
legal.terms_section5_responsibility: You are responsible for the content you post. B-Social reserves the right to remove content that violates these terms.
legal.terms_section6_platform_role: B-Social is a facilitation platform. We do not organize events ourselves, but provide tools for users and businesses who wish to organize activities.
legal.terms_section6_liability: B-Social assumes no responsibility for events created by users or businesses on the platform. Participation is at your own risk.
legal.terms_section7_description: B-Social owns all rights to the platform's design, code, logos and trademarks. You may not copy, distribute or create derivative works based on B-Social without written permission.
legal.terms_section8_intro: B-Social is provided "as is". We assume no liability for:
legal.terms_liability_loss: Loss or damage resulting from your use of the platform
legal.terms_liability_force_majeure: Force majeure, including natural disasters, war, pandemic, etc.
legal.terms_section8_cap: Our total liability is in all cases limited to the amount you may have paid to B-Social.
legal.terms_section9_user_deletion: You can delete your account at any time via Settings. Upon deletion, your data will be removed within 30 days, unless legislation requires longer retention.
legal.terms_section9_suspension: B-Social reserves the right to suspend or delete accounts that violate these terms without prior notice.
legal.terms_section10_description: We may update these terms from time to time. Material changes will be announced via app notification or email with at least 14 days' notice. Continued use of B-Social after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
legal.terms_section11_governing_law: These terms are governed by Danish law. Any disputes will be settled by the Court of Aalborg.
legal.terms_section11_complaint: You can also file a complaint via the EU's online dispute resolution platform:
legal.terms_section12_intro: If you have questions about these terms, you are welcome to contact us:
legal.terms_footer_line1: B-Social — Your platform for social experiences
